shops.name: Artima's Crafting Supplies
shops.description: Artima's Crafting Supplies is a crafting shop owned by Artima in Civitas illa Fortis, just south of the Fortis Cothon.

shops.name: Cobado's Groceries
shops.description: Cobado's Groceries is a cooking shop run by Cobado in Civitas illa Fortis, Varlamore.

shops.name: The Flaming Arrow
shops.description: The Flaming Arrow is a bar found in Civitas illa Fortis.

shops.name: Fortis Blacksmith
shops.description: The Fortis Blacksmith is a sword shop in Civitas illa Fortis that sells various metal armour and weapons. It is run by the blacksmith.

shops.name: Floria's Fashion
shops.description: Floria's Fashion is a clothes shop in Civitas illa Fortis. It is run by Floria and stocks various skirts, capes, and aprons along with leather gloves and boots.

shops.name: Fortis Baker's Stall
shops.description: The Fortis Baker's Stall is a bakery stall in the bazaar within Civitas illa Fortis. It is run by the baker and stocks cake, bread, and chocolate slices.

shops.name: Fortis Fur Stall
shops.description: The Fortis Fur Stall is a fur shop in the bazaar within Civitas illa Fortis. It is run by the Fur Merchant, and stocks bear, grey wolf, and jaguar furs.

shops.name: Fortis Gem Stall
shops.description: The Fortis Gem Stall is a gem shop in the bazaar within Civitas illa Fortis. It is run by the gem merchant, and stocks cut sapphires, emeralds, and rubies.

shops.name: Fortis General Store
shops.description: The Fortis General Store is a general store in Civitas illa Fortis. It is run by the shopkeeper, and stocks a variety of common goods.

shops.name: Fortis Silk Stall
shops.description: The Fortis Silk Stall is a silk shop in the bazaar within Civitas illa Fortis. It is run by the silk merchant, and stocks needles, thread, and silk.

shops.name: Fortis Spice Stall
shops.description: The Fortis Spice Stall is a spice shop in the bazaar within Civitas illa Fortis. It is run by the Spice Merchant, and stocks knives, spice, and garlic.

shops.name: Aldarin General Store
shops.description: Aldarin General Store is a general store run by a shopkeeper in north-eastern Aldarin.

shops.name: Faustus' Fruit and Veg
shops.description: Faustus' Fruit and Veg is a food shop in Aldarin run by Faustus. It is notable for having stock of grapes used for making wine a common way of training cooking. This is the only shop with grapes aside from the Culinaromancer's Chest.

shops.name: Toci's Gem Store
shops.description: Toci's Gem Store is a gem shop in Aldarin run by Toci. It has the highest amount in stock of sapphires, emeralds, and rubies of any shop outside of Mor Ul Rek, making it a good place for Ironman Mode players to obtain gems.

shops.name: The Burrow
shops.description: The Burrow is an underground cavern accessed from the centre of the Hunter Guild, and is primarily visited to receive Hunters' Rumours from the guild's hunters. A Hunter level of 46 is required to enter.

shops.name: Imia's Supplies
shops.description: Imia's Supplies is a hunter shop in the Hunter Guild run by Imia. Like all amenities in the guild, level 46 Hunter is required to access her wares.

shops.name: Pellem's Fur Store
shops.description: The Pellem's Fur Store is a fur shop run by Pellem in the south-eastern corner of the Hunter Guild.

shops.name: Sunset Coast General Store
shops.description: The Sunset Coast General Store is a general store run by a Shopkeeper in the centre of the Sunset Coast.

shops.name: Thurid's Brain Buckets
shops.description: Thurid's Brain Buckets is a shop run by Thurid located in the Sunset Coast. The shop offers medium and full helmets ranging from bronze to adamant, with the exception of black helms.

shops.name: Picaria's Fishing Shop
shops.description: Picaria's Fishing Shop is a shop run by Picaria, located east of the Sunset Coast with some fishing spots for fishing sharks right outside of it. Players can sell their unwanted fish here.

shops.name: Cam Torum Blacksmith
shops.description: Cam Torum Blacksmith is located in Cam Torum and operated by the blacksmith. It stocks various weapons and square shields, ranging from bronze to adamant.

shops.name: Cam Torum General Store
shops.description: Cam Torum General Store is a shop located in the south-west corner of the Cam Torum market.

shops.name: Conara's Jewels
shops.description: Conara's Jewels is located in Cam Torum and operated by Conara. The store sells many kinds of unenchanted jewellery, though it does not deal in dragonstone, onyx, or zenyte jewellery.

shops.name: Huito's Herbal Supplies
shops.description: Huito's Herbal Supplies is a shop in Cam Torum owned by Huito that sells Herblore supplies.

shops.name: The Runic Emporium
shops.description: The Runic Emporium is a magic shop run by Nahta, found around the centre of Cam Torum, just north-west of the market.

shops.name: Tizoro's Pickaxes
shops.description: Tizoro's Pickaxes is a shop that sells pickaxes in Cam Torum, run by Tizoro.

shops.name: Yarnio's Baked Goods
shops.description: Yarnio's Baked Goods is a food shop at the centre of Cam Torum. It is run by Yarnio.

shops.name: The Windbreaker
shops.description: The Windbreaker is a bar in Quetzacalli Gorge. Alongside Atlazora's Rest, it is the only bar to sell moon-lite.

shops.name: Quetzacalli Gorge General Store
shops.description: Quetzacalli Gorge General Store is a general store run by a shopkeeper in Quetzacalli Gorge.

shops.name: Salvager Overlook General Store
shops.description: The Salvager Overlook General Store is a general store located in Salvager Overlook. It is run by a sole shopkeeper.

shops.name: Salius' Armour Shop
shops.description: Salius' Armour Shop is a platebody shop in the Salvager Overlook. It is run by Salius.

shops.name: Stick Your Ore Inn
shops.description: The Stick Your Ore Inn is a bar found in Mistrock, on the southern side of the island of Aldarin. The bar is run by a bartender. The bar sells steamforge brews and sun-shine not found in bars on the mainland.

shops.name: Mistrock Mining Supplies
shops.description: Mistrock Mining Supplies is a Mining shop in Mistrock run by Necto.

shops.name: Shields of Mistrock
shops.description: Shields of Mistrock is a shield shop run by Ichta, an Imcando dwarf, in Mistrock.

shops.name: Sawmill
shops.description: A sawmill is a shop which also serves as a facility, and facilitates the creation of planks. The sawmill operator working there can turn seven different kinds of logs into planks for a fee, and also sells Construction supplies: saws, bolts of cloth, and three kinds of nails; they share the same stoc

shops.name: Auburnvale General Store
shops.description: Auburnvale General Store is a general store run by a shopkeeper in Auburnvale.

shops.name: Sebamo's Sublime Staffs
shops.description: Sebamo's Sublime Staffs is a staff shop in Auburnvale, owned by Sebamo.

shops.name: Lunami's Axe Shop
shops.description: Lunami's Axe Shop is located in Auburnvale and owned by Lunami.

shops.name: Auburn Pub
shops.description: Auburn Pub is a pub located in Auburnvale. Its bartender sells food and a wide range of alcohol. It is currently the closest shop to a bank that has an infinite stock of wine.

shops.name: Nemus Retreat (pub)
shops.description: Nemus Retreat is a pub located in the eponymous camp. Its bartender sells stew and a wide range of alcohol.

shops.name: Arcuani's Archery Supplies
shops.description: Arcuani's Archery Supplies is a shop in Tal Teklan selling ranged gear, run by Arcuani.

shops.name: Dyes to Die For
shops.description: Dyes to Die For is a dye shop run by Xochitl in Tal Teklan, selling a multitude of dyes directly for coins.

shops.name: Tal Teklan General Store
shops.description: Tal Teklan General Store is a general store in Tal Teklan run by a shopkeeper.

shops.name: Tal Teklan Rune Shop
shops.description: Tal Teklan Rune Shop is a members-only shop in Tal Teklan specializing in magical runes and rune packs, run by Teicuh.

shops.name: The King's Inn
shops.description: The King's Inn is a pub located in Tal Teklan where King sells food and a wide range of alcohol.

shops.name: Kastori General Store
shops.description: Kastori General Store is a members-only general store run by a shopkeeper in Kastori.

shops.name: Sulisal's Superb Fishing Store
shops.description: Sulisal's Superb Fishing Store is a shop run by Sulisal in Kastori, featuring fishing bait spawns.

shops.name: Kastori Farming Supplies
shops.description: Kastori Farming Supplies is a farming shop located in Kastori, run by Ameyalli.

shops.name: Karamja General Store
shops.description: The Karamja General Store is a general store located on Karamja carrying average general store stock. The store is also able to buy items at high alch value if the user is wearing Karamja Gloves 3 or above, which implicitly makes either 100 Combat level or 99 Slayer a requirement for this perk.

shops.name: Karamja Wines, Spirits, and Beers
shops.description: Karamja Wines, Spirits, and Beers is a shop run by Zembo that sells beer, Karamjan rum, and jugs of wine. According to Zembo, they are all brewed locally on the island.

shops.name: Davon's Amulet Store
shops.description: Davon's Amulet Store is a jewellery store in Brimhaven, owned by Davon. It stocks enchanted gem amulets, as well as holy symbols. It has a higher buying price and lower selling price to players wearing Karamja gloves 1 or higher.

shops.name: Dead Man's Chest
shops.description: The Dead Man's Chest is a bar in Brimhaven. (located in northern Karamja) Players can buy grog for 3 coins and Karamjan rum for 27 coins from the Bartender. It also plays a role in Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl miniquest, in which the player must drink Supergrog. There are some beer and empty beer glas

shops.name: The Shrimp and Parrot
shops.description: The Shrimp and Parrot is a restaurant in Brimhaven. It is run by Alfonse the waiter. During the Heroes' Quest, it is revealed that the restaurant is actually a hideout for the Phoenix Gang, set up as part of a scheme to steal Scarface Pete's candlesticks.

shops.name: Jiminua's Jungle Store
shops.description: Jiminua's Jungle Store is a general store that sells many useful items for those adventuring in the Karamjan jungle, such as antipoison, pickaxes, machetes, and axes. It is also notable for being one of the few places to obtain both charcoal and papyrus. Because of the items it stocks, this shop is

shops.name: Tiadeche's Karambwan Stall
shops.description: Tiadeche's Karambwan Stall is a store in Tai Bwo Wannai owned by Tiadeche. It sells raw karambwan and karambwan vessels, and can only be accessed after completion of Tai Bwo Wannai Trio, in which Tiadeche is shown how to fish.

shops.name: Tamayu's Spear Stall
shops.description: Tamayu's Spear Stall is a spear shop in Tai Bwo Wannai, owned by Tamayu, one of Timfraku's sons. It sells karambwan-poisoned spears and cleaning cloths. It requires completion of Tai Bwo Wannai Trio to access, because during the quest Tamayu learns how to use poisoned spears. It can only be accessed

shops.name: Falador General Store
shops.description: The Falador General Store mainly consists of useful low level items. It is the first building on the west side when entering through the north gate. The ground floor of the general store contains the shop keeper and the shop assistant.

shops.name: Flynn's Mace Market
shops.description: Flynn's Mace Market is a mace shop owned by Flynn in Falador. It is located between the Falador General Store and the Hairdresser in the north-western part of the city.

shops.name: Cassie's Shield Shop
shops.description: Cassie's Shield Shop is a specialty shop owned by Cassie that sells shields. It is located in Falador, just west of the park and south-east of the northern gate of the city.

shops.name: Herquin's Gems
shops.description: Herquin's Gems is located on the west side of Falador, just south of the west bank. It is owned by Herquin.

shops.name: Wayne's Chains
shops.description: Wayne's Chains is a shop owned by Wayne located in southern Falador. It is the only shop that specialises exclusively in chainbodies.

shops.name: Betty's Magic Emporium
shops.description: Betty's Magic Emporium is located in Port Sarim and owned by Betty. Free players must visit this store to buy an eye of newt for the Witch's Potion quest.

shops.name: Brian's Battleaxe Bazaar
shops.description: Brian's Battleaxe Bazaar is located in Port Sarim and owned by Brian. It is one of the two battleaxe stores in RuneScape - the other is located in Lumbridge. The shop stocks battleaxes from bronze to adamant.

shops.name: Grum's Gold Exchange
shops.description: Grum's Gold Exchange is located in Port Sarim and operated by Grum. The store buys and sells many kinds of unenchanted jewellery, though it does not deal in dragonstone, onyx, or zenyte jewellery or bracelets. It is one of only two jewellery stores in RuneScape (the other being Conara's Jewels), and

shops.name: Sarah's Farming Shop
shops.description: Sarah's Farming shop is a Farming shop at Sarah's farm south of Falador that sells various Farming items and buys certain crops.

shops.name: Gerrant's Fishy Business
shops.description: Gerrant's Fishy Business is located in Port Sarim. The shop sells Fishing supplies. It is run by Gerrant.

shops.name: Wydin's Food Store
shops.description: The Food Store, operated by Wydin, sells a variety of fresh food, and is located in Port Sarim. It plays a notable role in the Pirate's Treasure quest - it is the drop off point between Karamja and Asgarnia to find the otherwise illegal beverage Karamjan rum, after smuggling it from Karamja.

shops.name: Rimmington General Store
shops.description: The Rimmington General Store is a general store in Rimmington. It is run by the shop keeper and his assistant. The shop is most notable for being the location of Phials, who is often used in conjunction with the nearby POH portal for fast Construction and Prayer training.

shops.name: Rommik's Crafty Supplies
shops.description: Rommik's Crafty Supplies is located in Rimmington and owned by Rommik. It is a convenient place to buy Crafting supplies due to its close proximity to the Crafting Guild.

shops.name: Dommik's Crafting Store
shops.description: Dommik's Crafting Store is a Crafting supplies store owned by Dommik located in north-eastern Al Kharid. It is a convenient place to buy Crafting supplies due to its close proximity to a bank and a tanner.

shops.name: Brian's Archery Supplies
shops.description: Brian's Archery Supplies is a Ranged supplies shop owned by Brian and located in Rimmington.

shops.name: Lowe's Archery Emporium
shops.description: Lowe's Archery Emporium is located near central Varrock just east of the main square. This store is operated by Lowe.

shops.name: The Toad and Chicken
shops.description: The Toad and Chicken is a bar and an inn found in Burthorpe, north of Taverley. It caters primarily to the soldiers and citizens of Burthorpe. Wizard's mind bomb, Dwarven stout and Asgarnian ale are all purchasable from Tostig for two coins each. Players can also find a trapdoor leading to the Rogue

shops.name: Gaius' Two Handed Shop
shops.description: Gaius' Two Handed Shop is a shop in Taverley owned by Gaius that has a variety of two-handed swords ranging from bronze to adamant. This store does not sell the rune or dragon two-handed sword. It can be used as an easy source for the adamant two-handed sword needed for a hard emote clue scroll.

shops.name: Jatix's Herblore Shop
shops.description: Jatix's Herblore Shop is a shop in Taverley owned by Jatix that sells Herblore supplies. This shop sells empty vials and eyes of newt in packs.

shops.name: Nurmof's Pickaxe Shop
shops.description: Nurmof's Pickaxe Shop is located in the north-west cul-de-sac of the Dwarven Mine, accessed through the alley with the anvil, south-west from the north entrance. Alternatively, a disk of returning can be used anywhere within the mine to teleport players south west of the cul-de-sac entrance.

shops.name: Drogo's Mining Emporium
shops.description: Drogo's Mining Emporium is located in the Dwarven Mines, run by Drogo. Although labelled as a mining shop, it only sells hammers and bronze pickaxes. It does provide a place for players to sell their ores or bars, but it is relatively unpopular due to its inconvenient location.

shops.name: Crossbow Shop (Dwarven Mine)
shops.description: Hura's Crossbow Shop is a Crossbow stall run by Hura in the Dwarven Mine. It sells crossbow components, and has the same stock and prices as the White Wolf Mountain Crossbow Shop.

shops.name: Dwarven Shopping Store
shops.description: The Dwarven shopping store is a general store run by a dwarf in the Dwarven Mine. It is almost never visited, mainly because of its location; there are many general stores nearby (such as the ones in Falador or Edgeville) which are much easier to reach.

shops.name: Sigmund the Merchant
shops.description: Sigmund The Merchant is a merchant in the Rellekka market. His vote must be won to complete The Fremennik Trials by asking for a flower from the Sailor.

shops.name: Armour Shop (Jatizso)
shops.description: The Armour Shop is a store found on the Fremennik island of Jatizso, in the south-west corner. It is run by Raum Urda-Stein, and occupies the same building as the Ore Store, which is likely the source of its materials. One of the town's major resources is mining and smithing, which allows this store

shops.name: Ore store
shops.description: Ore store is an ore speciality store located in south-west Jatizso. It shares a building with the Armour Shop, which specialises in mithril armour. The shop-owner is Hring Hring. It is highly likely that the nearby metal Armour Shop smiths their weapons using ore obtained from the Ore Store. One of

shops.name: Weapons galore
shops.description: Weapons galore is a weapons store located in south-west Jatizso. The store specialises in weapons, specifically mithril, of which 4 of each weapon is stocked. The shop purchases these weapons for more than their high alch value. One of the towns major resources is mining and smithing, which allows t

shops.name: Flosi's Fishmongers
shops.description: Flosi's Fishmongers is a fish shop, located in north-eastern Jatizso. The shop specialises in raw seafood, which is one of the town's major resources. As the store name suggests, the owner is Flosi Dalksson. The store shares a building with Keepa Kettilon's store, which sells the cooked versions of

shops.name: Contraband yak produce
shops.description: Contraband yak produce is a store selling illegal yak goods, in central Jatizso, north of the longhall, owned by Vanligga Gastfrihet.

shops.name: Aemad's Adventuring Supplies
shops.description: Aemad's Adventuring Supplies is a general store in East Ardougne. The store is run by its owner, Aemad, and his assistant, Kortan. Although it does not sell the default items of a typical general store, it sells several items used in quests around RuneScape, notably rope.

shops.name: West Ardougne General Store
shops.description: The West Ardougne General Store is run by Chadwell in West Ardougne. It is where most of the city's populace get their food from.

shops.name: Ardougne Gem Stall
shops.description: The Ardougne Gem Stall is a gem shop in East Ardougne market run by the gem merchant.

shops.name: Ardougne Baker's Stall
shops.description: The Ardougne Baker's Stall is a store located on the east side of the East Ardougne market that sells bread, cake, chocolate slices, and chocolate bars. It is run by a baker. It requires 5 Thieving to steal from.

shops.name: Ardougne Spice Stall
shops.description: The Ardougne Spice Stall is a spice stall in East Ardougne that sells knives, spices, and garlic. It is run by the spice seller.

shops.name: Harry's Fishing Shop
shops.description: Harry's Fishing Shop is located in eastern Catherby. It is run by Harry. It is a convenient location for players because it is close to many Fishing spots. Players can sell their unwanted fish here.

shops.name: Hickton's Archery Emporium
shops.description: Hickton's Archery Emporium is located in central Catherby. Players with 99 Fletching may visit the store to buy the Fletching Cape of Accomplishment for 99,000 coins. Unlike most archery stores, Hickton's Archery Emporium stocks arrowtips for players who wish to create their own arrows using the Fle

shops.name: Arhein's General Goods
shops.description: Arhein's General Goods is a general store in Catherby. It is run by Arhein and is also known as the Catherby General Store.

shops.name: Candle Shop
shops.description: The Candle Shop, as the name implies, only sells candles. It is owned by the Candle maker and located in Catherby, just a little west of the town's bank. Players who need a black candle for the Merlin's Crystal quest can get one by trading a bucket of wax to this shop.

shops.name: Vanessa's Farming Shop
shops.description: Vanessa's Farming shop is a Farming shop in Catherby selling various Farming items run by Vanessa. There is a Farming shop near all the allotments, which is useful if players forget to bring an item.

shops.name: Trader Stan's Trading Post
shops.description: Trader Stan's Trading Post is a unique series of shops, operated by the Trader crewmembers and Trader Stan. There is a separate shop instance at each of the charter ship locations.

shops.name: Fight Arena Bar
shops.description: The Fight Arena Bar is a single-floored pub located in the south-western corner of the Fight Arena. The pub heavily relies on the Arena for its business, as it draws many customers ranging from spectators to guards.

shops.name: Armoury
shops.description: Armoury is a shop in the Combat Training Camp. This shop sells various weapons for Melee and Ranged combat. The owner is a shop keeper. Buying from this shop is not recommended because it charges prices 50% higher than other shops that sell the same items.

shops.name: Khazard General Store
shops.description: The Khazard General Store is a general store with two locations sharing the same stock in Port Khazard. The store has stock consistent with other general stores, as well as a few items that are unique to the Fishing Trawler minigame.

shops.name: Rometti's Fine Fashions
shops.description: Fine Fashions is a store in the Grand Tree that is owned by Rometti. He can be found north-east on the 1st floor2nd floor. He sells an assortment of gnome robes sets in five pastel colours. These colours are pink, green, blue, cream, and turquoise.

shops.name: Funch's Fine Groceries
shops.description: Funch's Fine Groceries is a shop owned by Heckel Funch in the Grand Tree. It sells items needed for Gnome cooking. The store is located on the east side of the Grand Tree's 1st floor2nd floor, east of Blurberry's Bar.

shops.name: Blurberry Bar
shops.description: Blurberry Bar is located inside the Grand Tree in the Gnome Stronghold. To get there, the player must climb to the 1st floor2nd floor and turn east. Players may talk to Blurberry to learn the art of gnome cuisine, which will then allow players to begin playing the minigame Gnome Restaurant. The barm

shops.name: Grand Tree Groceries
shops.description: Grand Tree Groceries is a shop run by Hudo that sells food supplies used in the Gnome Restaurant minigame. It is located on the 1st floor2nd floor in the north-western corner of the Grand Tree.

shops.name: Gianne's Restaurant
shops.description: Gianne's Restaurant is a food store located on the west side of the 1st floor2nd floor of the Grand Tree, owned by Aluft Gianne snr. and operated by the Gnome Waiters. It sells premade gnome food, which cannot be used for the Gnome Restaurant minigame.

shops.name: Gulluck and Sons
shops.description: Gulluck and Sons is a weapons shop owned and run by the gnomish trader Gulluck and his sons (though his sons do not appear in-game) on the 2nd floor3rd floor of the Grand Tree, the large keep of the Tree Gnome Stronghold. The shop is marked as a sword shop on the map even though Gulluck sells severa

shops.name: Lovecraft's Tackle
shops.description: Lovecraft's Tackle is a fishing shop in Witchaven, owned by Ezekial Lovecraft. It sells all normal fishing equipment.

shops.name: Frenita's Cookery Shop
shops.description: Frenita's Cookery Shop is a Cooking shop in Yanille run by Frenita. There is also a range, sink, and churn inside the building and dairy cows just north of Yanille.

shops.name: Zeke's Superior Scimitars
shops.description: Zeke's Superior Scimitars is located in Al Kharid, just north-east of the bank. It is run by Zeke, and sells scimitars up to mithril.

shops.name: Al Kharid General Store
shops.description: The Al Kharid General Store is a general store located in the desert town of Al Kharid.

shops.name: Louie's Armoured Legs Bazaar
shops.description: Louie's Armoured Legs Bazaar is a shop in Al Kharid which sells various platelegs. It is run by Louie Legs.

shops.name: Ranael's Super Skirt Store
shops.description: Ranael's Super Skirt Store is located in south-eastern Al Kharid. It sells plateskirts up to adamant. It is run by Ranael.

shops.name: Gem Trader
shops.description: Gem Trader is a gem shop run by the Gem trader in northern Al Kharid. It is a stall, but cannot be stolen from using the Thieving skill, unlike the gem stalls in Keldagrim, Ardougne, and Mor Ul Rek.

shops.name: Ali's Discount Wares
shops.description: Ali's Discount Wares is a shop owned by the swindler Ali Morrisane. It sells similar items as a general store, as well as desert survival gear. After completion of Rogue Trader, other items can be bought from the store.

shops.name: Shantay Pass Shop
shops.description: The Shantay Pass Shop is a shop owned by Shantay in the Shantay Pass. It sells items players might need in the Kharidian Desert, such as waterskins, knives, and desert clothing.

shops.name: Nardah General Store
shops.description: The Nardah General Store is a general store located in Nardah, owned by Kazemde. It sells very basic goods, and will buy any tradeable items sold to it.

shops.name: Nardah Hunter Shop
shops.description: The Nardah Hunter Shop is a shop in Nardah, selling Hunter items, owned by Artimeus, and a little north-east of the bank. It is one of four Hunter shops, the others being Aleck's Hunter Emporium in Yanille, Elder Strom's Hunting Stall in The Summer Shore and Imia's Supplies in the Hunter Guild.

shops.name: Rok's Chocs Box
shops.description: Rok's Chocs Box is a Choc-Ice Stall located in Nardah that sells chocolate bars and choc-ice. The stall is just south-east of the fountain in the city square and directly east from the general store icon. There is no icon on the minimap for this stall.

shops.name: Seddu's Adventurer's Store
shops.description: Seddu's Adventurer's Store is a shop in Nardah, run by Seddu. Compared to other shops, it sells items for slightly lower prices, and buys them at slightly higher prices. This makes it a somewhat popular moneymaking method to sell certain items to the shop.

shops.name: The Asp & Snake Bar
shops.description: The Asp & Snake Bar is located on the south side of Pollnivneach. As a result of it being in the town square and right on the river, it is a popular hangout amongst the locals. Ali the Barman serves players drinks from their large selection.

shops.name: Pollnivneach general store
shops.description: The Pollnivneach general store is a general store run by the market seller in Pollnivneach containing some unique items compared to other general stores. Items can be sold at 55% of their value, or 137.5% of the price offered in normal general stores.

shops.name: Ishmael's Fish He Sells
shops.description: Ishmael's Fish He Sells is a Fishing shop run by Ishmael in the Ruins of Unkah that sells Fishing supplies and raw fish.

shops.name: Blades by Urbi
shops.description: Blades by Urbi is a shop run by Urbi that sells daggers and scimitars in Sophanem next to her dagger stall. It is only available to players who have completed the Contact! quest.

shops.name: Jamila's Craft Stall
shops.description: Jamila's Craft Stall is a crafting shop owned by Jamila located in the city of Sophanem. To access Sophanem, the quest Icthlarin's Little Helper must be completed. Unlike other crafting stalls, the craft stall by Jamila cannot be stolen from.

shops.name: Nathifa's Bake Stall
shops.description: Nathifa's Bake Stall is a bakery stall owned by Nathifa that sells baked goods and waterskins. She is located in Sophanem. Access to this stall requires the completion of Contact!.

shops.name: The Spice is Right
shops.description: The Spice Is Right is a shop in the south-west corner of Sophanem. The shop owner is Embalmer who wanders inside the building behind his spice stall. The shop sells three dose antipoisons which can be useful for the nearby minigame Pyramid Plunder. The spice stall can be searched, but the player wil

shops.name: Raetul and Co's Cloth Store
shops.description: Raetul and Co's Cloth Store is a store in Sophanem that sells thread, desert clothes and other materials. The quest Icthlarin's Little Helper must be completed to access Sophanem. This store can only be accessed through conversation with Raetul who can be found in front of Siamun's establishment (wi

shops.name: Barkers' Haberdashery
shops.description: Barkers' Haberdashery is run by Barker. The shop sells an assortment of robe sets, gloves, and boots in five different colours; grey, red, yellow, teal, and purple. He also sells five coloured capes; red, black, blue, yellow, and green.

shops.name: General Store (Canifis)
shops.description: The Canifis General Store is located in north-western Canifis and is owned by Fidelio. Its wares are double the price of other general stores, and it always offers to buy items at the lowest price (as if the store has a full stock of the item). However, unlike other stores, the Canifis General Store

shops.name: Hair of the Dog
shops.description: The Hair of the Dog tavern is located in Canifis, south of the town square.

shops.name: Rufus' Meat Emporium
shops.description: Rufus' Meat Emporium is a food shop located in Canifis, run by Rufus. Raw meat and fish can be bought and sold here.

shops.name: The Green Ghost
shops.description: The Green Ghost is an inn found in Port Phasmatys, a large seaport found in north-eastern Morytania.

shops.name: Port Phasmatys General Store
shops.description: Port Phasmatys General Store is a shop run by the Ghost shopkeeper. A ghostspeak amulet must be worn to access this store. The store sells some general shop items but mainly features pots and buckets which are needed for the Ectofuntus.

shops.name: Razmire General Store
shops.description: The Razmire General Store is a general store located in Mort'ton, and is run by Razmire Keelgan. In addition to the standard general store items, there is a stock of Olive oil as well as the Flamtaer hammer. Access to this general store is unlocked during the Shades of Mort'ton quest.

shops.name: Razmire Builders Merchants
shops.description: Razmire Builders Merchants is a store with building supplies that is located in Mort'ton and run by Razmire Keelgan. The supplies it stocks are used for the Shades of Mort'ton minigame nearby.

shops.name: Aurel's Supplies
shops.description: Aurel's Supplies is a general store in Burgh de Rott, owned by Aurel. It requires completion of In Aid of the Myreque, as during the quest the shop is repaired and stocked. It is also the area where Gadderanks is confronted, and the Gadderhammer, while not found in the shop, can be bought for 3,000

shops.name: Amlodd's Magical Supplies
shops.description: Amlodd's Magical Supplies is a rune shop run by Efa on the north-west side of Prifddinas. It is one of few shops to stock cosmic runes, and the only shop to stock more than 30.

shops.name: Hefin Inn
shops.description: The Hefin Inn is a bar and an inn found on the north side of Prifddinas. Beer ("Just a beer"), Cider ("Something a bit fruity"), Stew ("Something to eat") and Elven dawn ("Some kind of local specialty") are all purchasable from Eira.

shops.name: Iorwerth's Arms
shops.description: Iorwerth's Arms is a weapons shop run by Celyn on the south side of Prifddinas.

shops.name: Prifddinas Foodstuffs
shops.description: Prifddinas Foodstuffs is a food shop run by Derwen on the north-east side of Prifddinas.

shops.name: Prifddinas Gem Stall
shops.description: Prifddinas Gem Stall is a Gem stall run by Glenda on the north-east side of Prifddinas.

shops.name: Prifddinas General Store
shops.description: The Prifddinas General Store is a general store run by Gwallter on the south-east side of Prifddinas.

shops.name: Prifddinas Herbal Supplies
shops.description: The Prifddinas Herbal Supplies is a herblore shop run by Llio found on the north-east side of Prifddinas.

shops.name: Prifddinas Silver Stall
shops.description: Prifddinas Silver Stall is a Silver stall run by Osian on the north-east side of Prifddinas.

shops.name: Prifddinas Spice Stall
shops.description: Prifddinas Spice Stall is a Spice stall run by Caerwyn on the north-east side of Prifddinas.

shops.name: Prifddinas' Seamstress
shops.description: Prifddinas' Seamstress is a crafting shop run by Nia on the west side of Prifddinas.

shops.name: Lletya Archery Shop
shops.description: Lletya Archery Shop is a store run by Dalldav in Lletya that sells bows and arrows.

shops.name: Lletya Food Store
shops.description: The Lletya Food Store is located on the second level of the buildings in Lletya. The shop owner is called Gethin. The store is stocked with bread, cooked lobsters, jugs of wine, cheese, and cakes.

shops.name: Lletya General Store
shops.description: Lletya General Store is a store run by Eudav, an elven proprietor in Lletya, which sells a few commonly used, inexpensive items which are typically found in every General store. The Mourning's End Part I quest needs to be started to in order to access Lletya.

shops.name: Lletya Seamstress
shops.description: Lletya Seamstress is a store run by Oronwen, an elven proprietor in Lletya, that sells crafting items including the main six colours of dyes pre-made. Partial completion of Mourning's End Part I is required to access Lletya.

shops.name: Bandit Bargains
shops.description: Bandit Bargains is a general store in the Bandit Camp, owned by the Bandit shopkeeper. Like most general stores in the Kharidian Desert, it sells desert survival equipment. However, unlike usual general stores, you may not sell any tradeable item to this store. The owner will not attack if a player

shops.name: Bandit Duty Free
shops.description: Bandit Duty Free, owned by Noterazzo, is a general store located in the Wilderness Bandit Camp. It offers some of the best prices among general stores, initially buying items at their high alchemy value (60% of the base value) while most others buy at low alchemy value (40%).

shops.name: Tony's Pizza Bases
shops.description: Tony's Pizza Bases is a shop owned by Fat Tony that sells pizza bases for 4 coins each stocking them 30 at a time. The shop is located in the Wilderness Bandit Camp. Players should be careful as the shop is in the Wilderness and they risk getting attacked by PKers and Bandits.

shops.name: The Golden Field
shops.description: The Golden Field is a tavern owned by Richard and Golova, located in Hosidius. There are many farmers swapping stories inside.

shops.name: Little Shop of Horace
shops.description: Little Shop of Horace is a general store run by Horace in Hosidius, just east of the bank.

shops.name: Logava Gricoller's Cooking Supplies
shops.description: Logava Gricoller's Cooking Supplies is a Fruit Stall located in Hosidius. It is run by Logava, the granddaughter of Farmer Gricoller.

shops.name: Vannah's Farming Stall
shops.description: Vannah's Farming Stall is a farming shop located in Hosidius in the farmer's market. It is run by Vannah and it sells farming supplies.

shops.name: Thirus Urkar's Fine Dynamite Store
shops.description: Thirus Urkar's Fine Dynamite Store is a mining shop run by Thirus located in Lovakengj, outside the blast mine.

shops.name: Toothy's Pickaxes
shops.description: Toothy's Pickaxes is a store located in Lovakengj, near the sulphur mine, and is owned by Toothy. The shop sells pickaxes and empty pots.

shops.name: Little Munty's Little Shop
shops.description: Little Munty's Little Shop is a General store located in Lovakengj. It is run by Munty, a dwarven connoisseur.

shops.name: The Deeper Lode
shops.description: The Deeper Lode is a tavern owned by Fuggy, located in Lovakengj. The shop sells various alcoholic beverages.

shops.name: Tynan's Fishing Supplies
shops.description: Tynan's Fishing Supplies is located in Port Piscarilius, directly east of the bank. The shop sells empty buckets, small and big fishing nets, fishing rods, harpoons, lobster pots, bait, and sandworms (which are used to catch anglerfish). It is run by Tynan.

shops.name: Leenz's General Supplies
shops.description: Leenz's General Supplies is located in Port Piscarilius. It is run by Leenz. Unlike other general stores, this shop sells both bronze nails and iron nails, and is the only shop besides the Construction supplies shop to sell them.

shops.name: Briget's Weapons
shops.description: Briget's Weapons is a sword shop in the south-east corner of Shayzien run by Briget.

shops.name: Blair's Armour
shops.description: Blair's Armour is a shop located in the north-east corner of Shayzien. The shop is run by Blair.

shops.name: The Cloak and Stagger
shops.description: The Cloak and Stagger is a bar and an inn found in Shayzien. The only drinking establishment in Shayzien, it is run by Oswald and Sheryl and is the only location that sells the Lizardkicker.

shops.name: Daryl's Ranging Surplus
shops.description: Daryl's Ranging Surplus is an archery shop in Shayzien, just east of the Shayzien Administration building. It is run by Daryl.

shops.name: Jennifer's General Supplies
shops.description: Jennifer's General Supplies is a shop owned by Jennifer. It is located east of bank in Shayzien.

shops.name: Shayzien Styles
shops.description: Shayzien styles is a clothing shop in Shayzien found east of the bank. It is run by Robyn.

shops.name: Make-over mage
shops.description: The Makeover Mage, also known as Pete or Peta depending on whether they are currently male or female, is a wizard who possesses the magical knowledge to change the player's body type, skin colour or pronouns, completely free of charge. Approximately every 10 seconds, they will switch genders.

shops.name: Perry's Chop-chop Shop
shops.description: Perry's Chop-chop Shop is an axe shop run by Perry located within the Woodcutting Guild in Hosidius. Accessing it requires a player to have level 60 in Woodcutting (boostable).
